page: UpCloud CLOUDNATIVE-32xCPU-128GB is a general-purpose virtual server built on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an AMD EPYC 7542 processor running at 2.0 GHz. The system provides 32 vCPUs mapped to 32 physical cores with a shared CPU allocation model. It is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core. There are no integrated GPUs or bundled local storage drives included with this instance type.

Performance benchmarks indicate a balanced profile with notable strengths in multi-threaded operations. While single-core CPU performance via stress-ng is positioned in the bottom 10%, multi-core execution scales to average levels. The server demonstrates strong capabilities in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, passmark CPU extended instructions, and encryption tests, all scoring in the top 25%. Memory bandwidth and web serving throughput remain within average parameters, while large-model LLM inference tasks show weaker performance.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the shared CPU allocation and lack of bundled local storage position this server as a resource-dense option for workloads requiring high core counts and substantial memory without the premium of dedicated CPU pinning. It is well-suited for multi-threaded batch processing, software compilation, database operations, and static web serving.
description: UpCloud CLOUDNATIVE-32xCPU-128GB is an x86_64 general-purpose virtual server running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 32 vCPUs on an AMD EPYC 7542 processor clocked at 2.0 GHz, paired with 128.0 GB of RAM. The instance features a shared CPU allocation model and does not include bundled local storage or GPU hardware. In benchmark testing, the server exhibits average multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance, with strong results in multi-threaded decompression and cryptographic operations, though single-core performance is relatively weak. This hardware profile is suited for multi-threaded workloads, software compilation, and database operations that benefit from high core counts and memory density without requiring dedicated CPU resources.
og_description: UpCloud CLOUDNATIVE-32xCPU-128GB is an x86_64 virtual server featuring 32 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and a KVM hypervisor, offering balanced multi-core performance for general-purpose workloads.
meta_description: UpCloud CLOUDNATIVE-32xCPU-128GB is an x86_64 virtual server with 32 AMD EPYC vCPUs and 128 GB RAM, optimized for multi-threaded workloads.
tagline: A high-core virtual server with balanced memory configuration, optimized for multi-threaded processing and general-purpose enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 32 AMD EPYC vCPUs and 128 GB RAM on x86_64 architecture
Shared CPU allocation model utilizing the KVM hypervisor
Strong multi-threaded decompression and cryptographic performance
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators included
Suited for software compilation, databases, and web serving
